title: Result - Czech-republic
content:
Welcome to the Czech Republic, a Central European treasure with 12 UNESCO World Heritage Sites, stunning castles, world-famous beers and a rich history.
In Prague, visit the ninth-century Prague Castle and the iconic Charles Bridge. Explore museums, historic chateaus and old towns to uncover Central Europe’s past. Relax in Karlovy Vary’s famous spas or take a boat trip on the Vltava River. Hockey enthusiasts will feel at home, as ice hockey is the country’s favourite sport. Enjoy vibrant nightlife and the charm of a land steeped in culture and tradition.

## Unique food tradition
Bramborák (potato pancake): a pancake made from grated potatoes, flour, eggs and garlic.
Services account for a significant portion of the Czech Republic economy, including research and development, software development, nanotechnology, and life sciences.

### Local legend or myth
Přemysl the Ploughman: is a humble peasant chosen by the nobles of Bohemia to be their king. He was recognized for his strength, wisdom, and character. Přemysl married Libuše, a wise princess who had foreseen his kingship. Together, they ruled Bohemia, marking the beginning of the Přemyslid dynasty. The story of Přemysl symbolizes the idea that true leadership can come from humble beginnings.

### Language of the Land
Czech is a West Slavic language that's closely related to Slovak, Polish and the Sorbian languages.
castles and chateaux can be found in the Czech Republic, including Prague Castle, the largest ancient castle in the world.
